item.title: OmniaBench：跨不同场景对通用人工智能代理进行基准测试
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14989v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models are increasingly evolving from text generators into general agents capable of understanding user requests, invoking external tools, and completing complex tasks through interaction. However, existing agent benchmarks often focus on limited scenarios,
